name: Tower Loan
description_short: Tower Loan offers installment and personal loans at physical branch locations across multiple states, including a NW San Antonio office. They provide fixed-rate loans for various purposes with quick online and in-person application processes.
description_long:
Tower Loan is an established installment lender operating across nine states (Alabama, Florida, Illinois, Louisiana, Mississippi, Missouri, Tennessee, and Texas) with multiple physical branch locations. The company has a documented history and maintains a presence in communities where customers can apply in person or online. Their NW San Antonio branch is located at 2561 Jackson Keller Road and serves Bexar, Atascosa, Bandera, and Frio counties.

Tower Loan specializes in installment and personal loans ranging from small emergency loans to larger consolidation loans. Their product offerings include personal loans, installment loans, vacation loans, home improvement loans, auto-secured loans, emergency loans, and debt consolidation loans. They emphasize fixed payment amounts over predefined periods, which distinguishes installment products from revolving credit. Online applications can receive decisions within minutes during business hours, and customers can also apply in-branch or by phone.

The company differentiates itself through multi-channel access (online, phone, in-person), extended business hours including evening appointments (until 6:30pm on Mondays and Fridays), and a 24/7 bill payment phone line. They maintain multiple San Antonio-area locations within reasonable driving distance, and their website provides educational resources including a financial education section and FAQ materials. Their secured personal loan option and emphasis on fixed-rate structures appeal to borrowers seeking payment predictability.

While Tower Loan provides accessible lending through physical locations and online channels, the website does not disclose specific APR ranges, credit requirements, loan amounts, or terms. No independent review data or regulatory compliance information is presented on the website itself. Borrowers cannot evaluate actual costs before applying, and the absence of transparent pricing details is a significant limitation for comparison shopping.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Quick online application decisions within minutes during business hours
Multiple access channels: online, phone (24/7 bill pay line), and in-person branch visits
Extended branch hours including evening appointments until 6:30pm on Mondays and Fridays
Fixed interest rates and payment amounts over predefined periods, eliminating monthly adjustments
Multiple San Antonio-area branch locations (NW, South, and Live Oak) within 12.6 miles for convenience
Serves a wide geographic area across four counties (Bexar, Atascosa, Bandera, Frio)
Secured personal loan options available with certain limitations
cons: No APR ranges, loan amounts, or specific terms disclosed on the website
No pricing transparency prevents consumers from comparing costs before application
No independent reviews, ratings, or regulatory compliance information provided
Limited information about credit score requirements or qualification criteria
Website content is truncated (vacation loans section ends mid-sentence)
best_for: San Antonio-area residents who prefer in-person loan meetings and advice
Borrowers seeking fixed-payment installment loans for specific purposes (vacation, home improvement, debt consolidation)
Customers who value extended business hours and multiple convenient branch locations
People needing quick application processing with same-day or next-day decisions
diagnosis: Tower Loan is best suited for consumers in the Southwest (particularly Texas and nearby states) who want accessible, fixed-rate installment lending with in-person support and extended hours. The critical caveat is the complete lack of APR, term, and loan amount transparency on their website—borrowers cannot evaluate actual costs before committing to an application.
services: Online personal loans with rapid application decisions
In-person installment loans at physical branch locations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2561 Jackson Keller Rd, San Antonio, TX 78230
